scripts.sync: bb scripts/validate/validate-rules.bb src/karabiner.edn && bb scripts/validate/validate-extras.bb src/karabiner.edn && bb scripts/edit/normalize-edn.bb src/karabiner.edn src/karabiner.edn && bb scripts/edit/reorder-by-state.bb src/karabiner.edn src/karabiner.edn && bb scripts/generate/states.bb && cp src/karabiner.edn ~/.config/ && goku && bb scripts/edit/fix-device-conditions.bb && bb scripts/edit/add-repeat.bb && bb scripts/edit/relink-karabiner-json.bb && bb scripts/test/run-tests.bb && bash scripts/actions/reload-karabiner.sh && osascript -e 'display notification "Done syncing" with title "Karabiner"'
scripts.kinesis: test -d /Volumes/ADV360/layouts && for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9; do cp src/kinesis-layout1.txt /Volumes/ADV360/layouts/layout${i}.txt; done && echo 'Copied to all 9 layout slots' || echo 'Kinesis drive not mounted'
